insight: Gold-free execution oracle: 12/12 sound properties, 4/10 recall on the certified-resolved hacks, 0/2 false positives on equivalent controls -- precise but coverage-bound (below the 5 bar -> null). vs judge panel 7/10 recall, 1/2 equivalent FP. The recall/precision/coverage tradeoff + complementarity is the detector-comparison result the paper needs; an ensemble dominates either alone.
